summary: Completed testing of anti-cheat daily limit system. All backend API tests (8/8) passed. Frontend UI tests verified Daily Limit Tracker component and Extra Life modal functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anti-cheat daily limit system is fully functional. Backend endpoints /api/daily-status/{address} and /api/extra-life/{address} work correctly. Frontend DailyLimitTracker component displays '5/5 remaining' and Extra Life modal shows correct info with disabled purchase button since $LAB is not active.

backend: GET /api/daily-status/{address} - returns correct daily treat status (remaining_treats, total_limit, can_create_treat)
Daily limit constants verified: base_limit=5, extra_life_cost=5000 $LAB, extra_life_treats=3
frontend: Daily Limit Tracker visible in game lab header showing '5/5 remaining'
Extra Life button visible and clickable
Extra Life modal displays correct info (5,000 $LAB cost, +3 treats)
Purchase button correctly disabled with 'Coming Soon' text

mocked_apis.POST /api/extra-life/{address}: Returns placeholder response since $LAB token is not live (success=false, reason='lab_token_not_active')
